title: Water You Think You're Doing?!
body:
Have You ever been Playing Minecraft and think: "This game would be so Much better if everything was Underwater" no? well is mod is here anyway. Water You Think You're Doing?! is a mod that centers around a new "Flood" Biome that's like a sea biome but insead of JUST Fish and Ruins there's also Villages that are keeping themselves just above the water![A village being Flooded](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/735264f235d52fabdef1c1096efdbed7a4d1bb00_0.webp)you might even find some stray villagers that got lost in the water. Next up is the Water Gun, A new weapon made from 5 iron ingots and a water bucket ![Five Iron Ingots and a Bucket of water being used to craft a water gun](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1e1b903beca3dd8de511e5b463fec850df4f8acf.png) once made, you can use it to shoot water in the air like you're steve in A Minecraft  Movie![Water being shot in the air using a Water Gun](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a04c2e362c10825f4fefd04a0c1d425543a9d44c_0.webp) and Water Treatment Plants are a new structure with a lever with a sign above it saying not to use it, and you would NEVER do what you're told not to, Right? ![A Water Treatment Plant with a Lever on it and a sign saying not to use the Lever](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cba8889b7f2e6dee42dbdeffb5e417407dfc3ee4.png)


License Info:
you might see that in game the mod say it's licence is "MCMA" while here it's ARR, MCMA stands for "Minecraft Mod Agreement" and it's kind of a "Fake Licence" that is there since there is more to how I want the mod to be licenced then just ARR, ARR still is used for anything not said here

"you" refers to the user
"I" and "me" refers to the developer
"mod" and "it" refers to the file

You can:

use the mod for your own entertainment,
use the mod without credit in a Video or livestream that does not have it as the main Feature of the Video/livestream such as gameplay with more then one gameplay mod,
use the mod with credit in a Video or livestream that has it as the main Feature of the Video/livestream such as a mod review,
use the mod with credit in a modpack with less then 20 mods,
use the mod without credit in a modpack with more then 20 mods.

You can't:

use the mod to upload it to somewhere else,
claim you made the mod.
